name: Manji
description: Manji is the protagonist of the Japanese manga series Blade of the Immortal. In the story, he's known infamously both as the "Hundred Man Killer" for the number of men he's killed by the beginning of the series, and "Mister Twelve Blades" for the number of weapons he carries. name: Shintarou Kisaragi
description: The main protagonist of the manga and brother of Momo Kisaragi, Shintaro is a hikikomori and as such, he has a hard time dealing with people. He seems to be constantly bothered by Ene. First appeared in Transparent Answer. A hikikomori (recluse/shut-in) young man with an IQ of 168. In middle school and high school, he performed at the top of his class in National Mock Examinations, but due to the suicide of a close friend (Ayano), he dropped out of his first year of high school. name: Yamcha
description: __Dragonball:__ Yamcha, the notorious desert bandit, started out as an antagonist of Goku but quickly became his friend thanks to Bulma. He lived in the desert, which resulted in him never having much female contact. Whenever he encountered Bulma, he would blush immensely and become petrified right on the spot. name: Bocchan
description: He is the firstborn of his noble family, and was considered to be the next head of his family until he was ostracized and cast out of his family for being cursed. As the single possessor of a curse that allows him to unintentionally kill any living thing with a single touch, he lives alone in a decrepit mansion located deep within a forest with his servants, Alice and Rob.

description: Leader of an evil organization set out to destroy Earth. On his days off, however, he indulges in plenty of Earth pleasantries, ranging from food to looking at his favorite animal, pandas.

name: Akira
description: __Height__: 159 cm __Species__: Snow Kemono Akira, is the fifty-sixth child of Shirona of the Snow Village in Mount Iwaki. He's currently an employee of the Kemono office. Akira is a very energetic and approachable person but sometimes clumsy, sometimes even not being able to complete tasks properly. name: Anaak Jahad

Though she is only a demi-princess because of the diluted Jahad's blood in her, she used to possess two of the 13 Month Series at one point; something only a few Princesses have accomplished. name: Karamatsu Matsuno
description: The second brother. Likes to play tough and cool, but so far he really isn't doing a good job. Is ignored by his brothers most of the time, so even the slightest compliments make him happy. Is the kindest of the six and will do anything for his family, incapable of saying "no" when asked for help. Chibita is his only friend, and, just like all of his brothers, is in love with Totoko. There is times when he gets serious and angry, but these moments are rare, only happening when the situation trul

name: Kirie Goshima
description: Kirie Goshima, a schoolgirl in the town of Kurouzucho, becomes concerned with her boyfriend Shuichi Saito’s father who has become obsessed with collecting and staring at spiral patterns to the ignorance of all else. After Shuichi’s father kills himself inside a washing machine, his cremated remains hang over the town in a giant cloud. The obsessive behaviour starts to spread to Kirie’s father and others, while all around the town people start bodily mutating into spiral creatures.

name: Koala
description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3") __Debut:__ Chapter 622; Episode 541 __Occupations:__ ~!Revolutionary Army Officer; Assistant Fish-Man Karate Instructor; Slave (former)!~ __Residence:__ ~!Baltigo (former); Foolshout Island (former); Mary Geoise (former); Momoiro Island!~ Koala is a former slave who was set free by Fisher Tiger's rampage on Mariejois. She sailed along with the Sun Pirates to reach her home town. First Appearance: Chapter 622; Episode 541 (source: One Piece Wikia)

name: Kurumu Kurono
description: __Height:__ 153 cm Kurumu Kurono is a succubus, and is initially jealous of Moka's popularity overshadowing her own, though she eventually considers Moka a friend. She tries to seduce Tsukune and the male student body, using her charming techniques (through her succubi abilities, including her busty physique), making them her slaves. This is so she can find her "mate of fate", in order to save her diminishing species, with the assumption that Moka is blocking her path. After Tsukune persuades th

name: Musashi Miyamoto
description: A swordsman from the early Edo Period, famous as the strongest swordmaster in Japanese history. Learned in the “Niten Ichi-ryu” (a school that was supposedly founded by Musashi), an expert of “dual wielding” that employs a long sword and a short sword. ....or so it should have been, but it seems that her circumstances are somehow different from the Musashi that left his name in history.

name: Rally Vincent
description: Master gunsmith, highly successful bounty hunter, and all-around action girl, Rally Vincent's love of guns and fast cars came from her father. He vanished under mysterious circumstances when she was young, and she entered the bounty hunting profession to gain easier access to both sides of law, in an effort to find him. Over the years, she has made many close friends and even more committed enemies. She operates both her gunsmithing and bounty hunting business from a small shop in Chicago. _In R

name: Rim
description: Rim is a ferocious dragon that often takes the appearance of a little girl. In the exchange for a promise for tasty food, she helps [Kinji](https://anilist.co/character/179362/Kinji-Ninomiya) out. She has a voracious appetite.

name: Ritsu
description: An artificial intelligence developed in Norway and sent to Class 3-E as a transfer student to dispose of Korosensei, able to learn his movement patterns and perfect her shooting skills in order to eventually kill him. After receiving a few modifications from Korosensei, she develops a conscience and becomes friends with the rest of class 3-E, who give her her shortened nickname. name: Sakurako Busujima
description: She is a student at Oumi Women's University and the coworker of Iori Kitahara and Naomi Otoya. She has a crush on Otoya Naomi. ~!She was cheered up by Iori after Naomi rejected her confession. Soon after that, she has developed romantic feelings for Iori, of which he is unaware. She lip-locked him in front of Chisa and Aina during their second trip to Okinawa islands.!~

name: Chiyomi Anzai
description: **Height:** 156 cm (5'1") **Home Town:** Toyota, Aichi Prefecture "Duce" Anchovy is Anzio's overall commander, who uses a Carro Armato P 40 heavy tank. She wears the uniform of the Black Shirts, similar to that of Benito Mussolini. Anchovy is a self-confident, hot-blooded, sometimes even cruel leader, seeing every Sensha-dō battle as personal duel between the leaders. name: Rin
description: Trapped in her beautiful, yet lonely days, she begins to wonder about the outside world, and why she is all alone.

name: Yousuke Koiwai
description: Koiwai is Yotsuba's adoptive father. The circumstances of her adoption are obscure; he tells Fuuka that without intending to, he found himself taking care of her while somewhere overseas, but gives no other details. Though he acknowledges Yotsuba is a bit odd, he can be offbeat himself. He is depicted as something of a slacker; he habitually wears an undershirt and boxer shorts when working at home during the summer, and apologizes more than once for being irresponsible. name: Ayumu Uehara
description: __Height:__ 159 cm (5'2") Ayumu Uehara is one of thirteen members of the Nijigasaki High School Idol Club. She is a member of A・ZU・NA, a unit under Nijigaku. She is a second year student and her image color is light pink. She is hard working and believes that trying your best is the only thing to do. She is kind, sociable and wants everyone to succeed. Ayumu can also be rather clumsy at times.
